title: Locate Files With find
description:
## How Many Log Files?

A directory tree has been created at **`/root/logs`** containing a mix of files in subfolders.

**Your task:** count **all `*.log` files** anywhere under `/root/logs` (including subdirectories) and write the number to **`/root/count.txt`**.

> 💡 `find <dir> -name '*.log' -type f` lists matching files recursively; pipe to `wc -l` to count, then redirect to the file.

hints.title: Find then count
hints.body: find searches recursively by default. Restrict to regular files with -type f and the name pattern, then count lines.

validation.description: Checks that /root/count.txt contains the number of .log files (3).
